summary: Major delivery cycle: both sprint PRs landed. PR #869 (fix/rust-kernel-tool-action-map-count-867) merged at 11:37 UTC and PR #870 (Go kernel rewrite + 9-squad swarm expansion — 9,474 lines, 242 tests across 8 packages) merged at 11:56 UTC. Previous blocker (ci-failure-pr-870) fully resolved. New open PR #888 (fix/848-npx-scoped-package-name) has a lint CI failure — all other checks green. Assigned to senior-coder. No P0/P1 issues in tracker.
